directive_basis_quote: Hawking may ascend with a winning functional architecture, a winning encoding architecture, a hybrid, or an honest empirical floor. It may not ascend with a broken promotion metric.
floor: methodology, metric system and native runtime ascended; the cross-parent Gravity frontier is OPEN AND PROMISING. GLM closed FUNCTIONAL_PARTIAL_ONLY (expansive). gated.wall: NOT a memory-capacity law. A sequential layer-streamed forward (load layer, execute, release, advance hidden) can in principle run the 160 GB source on 96 GiB. The real blocker is apparatus+validation: no independently validated streamed implementation yet exists for DeepSeek MLA + DSA + hyper-connections + mixed FP4/FP8 MoE.

gravity_reframe: Gravity is not the compression of individual tensors or organs. It is the preservation of a stable causal trajectory under the smallest executable physical system.
honest_scope: no capability claim anywhere; every score is on bounded calibration batches; the DeepSeek probe is one organ on embedding-seeded inputs, proven instrument-limited by its own control
